text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, look at this. I posted a pic last night
before I went to bed.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I got sooo many comments... Yaaawn... That sure was fun. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems Curren Chan didn't get enough sleep.
